title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.
title_es: Microsoft lanza división de despliegue de IA con inversión de $2.5B
bajada: Microsoft crea su propia unidad de despliegue de IA con un compromiso de $2.5 mil millones, uniéndose a Amazon, OpenAI y Anthropic en esta estrategia. El movimiento refleja la transición de la industria hacia la infraestructura de producción como área crítica de inversión.
bajada_en: Microsoft establishes its own AI deployment division with a $2.5 billion commitment, joining Amazon, OpenAI and Anthropic in this strategy. The move reflects the industry's shift toward production infrastructure as a critical investment area.

title: ProductJun 30, 2026Introducing Claude Sonnet 5Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale.
summary: Product Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Jun 30, 2026 Claude Sonnet 5 is built to be the most agentic Sonnet model yet. It can make plans, use tools like browsers and terminals, and run autonomously at a level that, just a few months ago, required larger and more expensive models. For many developers, the agentic AI era began with Sonnet-class models: Claude Sonnet 3.5, 3.6, and 3.7 were the first models that showed impressive skills in coding and tool use. More recently, though, the clearest gains in agentic capabilities have been in our Opus-class models. Sonnet 5 narrows the gap: its performance is close to that of Opus 4.8, but at lower prices. It’s a substantial improvement over its predecessor, Sonnet 4.6, on important aspects of agentic performance like reasoning, tool use, coding, and knowledge work: Scores for Sonnet 5 on a variety of evaluations compared to those of Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8 (a more generally capable model, for reference). The Claude Sonnet 5 System Card reports a broader set of evaluations in detail. Our safety assessments found that Sonnet 5 shows an overall lower rate of undesirable behaviors than Sonnet 4.6, and is generally safer to use in agentic contexts. Evaluations also show that it has a much lower ability to perform cybersecurity tasks than our current Opus models. From today, Claude Sonnet 5 is available across all plans: it is the default model for Free and Pro plans, and is available to Max, Team, and Enterprise users. It’s also available in Claude Code and on the Claude Platform, where it launches with introductory pricing of $2 per million input tokens and $10 per million output tokens through August 31, 2026, after which it will be priced at $3 per million input tokens and $15 per million output tokens. Developers can use claude-sonnet-5 via the Claude API . Working with Claude Sonnet 5 The charts below compare the performance of Sonnet 5 with Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8 at different effort levels on the agentic search evaluation Bro
title_es: Anthropic presenta Claude Sonnet 5 con capacidades agenticas mejoradas
bajada: Claude Sonnet 5 acerca el rendimiento de los modelos Sonnet al nivel de Opus, ofreciendo mejoras significativas en razonamiento, uso de herramientas y codificación. El modelo es más seguro que su predecesor y mantiene precios accesibles para developers que necesitan agentes autónomos.
bajada_en: Claude Sonnet 5 closes the performance gap between Sonnet and Opus models, delivering significant improvements in reasoning, tool use, and coding. The model is safer than its predecessor while maintaining accessible pricing for developers needing autonomous agents.

title: NVIDIA Unlocks AI Compute at Scale, Inviting Partners to Power the AI Infrastructure Buildout
summary: As AI moves from model development to production inference, compute demand is accelerating and shifting toward continuously operating AI factories that generate tokens at scale. This shift requires access to large‑scale, multi‑tenant accelerated computing that can come online quickly, stay highly utilized and support the economics of token‑scale AI services.  Emerging AI companies historically have […]
title_es: NVIDIA impulsa infraestructura de IA con socios para escalar producción
bajada: NVIDIA anuncia una iniciativa para acelerar la infraestructura de IA en producción, enfocándose en la demanda creciente de cómputo para inference a escala. La compañía busca asociarse con proveedores para hacer accesible el hardware acelerado necesario para ejecutar servicios de IA de forma continua y rentable.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announces an initiative to accelerate AI infrastructure in production, focusing on growing demand for scaled inference compute. The company seeks to partner with providers to make accelerated hardware accessible for running continuous, cost-effective AI services at scale.

title: Redeploying Fable 5AnnouncementsJun 30, 2026Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
summary: Announcements Redeploying Fable 5 Jun 30, 2026 Update Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 redeployed Jul 1, 2026 Access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 is now restored. On Friday, June 12, the US government applied export controls to our newest models, Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5. This required us to restrict access to foreign nationals, whether inside or outside the United States. Because the order took effect immediately and we had no reliable way to verify nationality in real-time, we suspended access to both models for all users. As of today, June 30, the export controls on Fable 5 and Mythos 5 have been lifted . Fable 5 will be available starting tomorrow, Wednesday, July 1, to users globally on the Claude Platform, Claude.ai, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork. For Pro, Max, Team, and select Enterprise plans, 1 Fable 5 will be included for up to 50% of weekly usage limits through July 7, after which it will be available via usage credits . We will re-enable access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Foundry as quickly as possible. We have also restored access to Mythos 5 for a set of US organizations, following the US government’s approval on June 26 . We continue to coordinate with the government to expand access to the broader set of domestic and international partners in the Glasswing program. In the remainder of this post, we provide further details and updates in four areas: A timeline of events, including updates we made to our safeguards . We discuss the events that led to the export control directive and how we addressed it with new safeguards. Our general approach to safeguards . We provide more context on how we use safety classifiers to detect potentially dangerous cybersecurity uses of our models. A shared industry framework . Although we have reached a constructive resolution, these events have made clear that the industry needs a consistent way to assess and fix potential “jailbreaks” of AI models (techniques that bypass a model’s safeguards). 2 A shar
title_es: Anthropic restaura acceso global a Fable 5 tras levantamiento de controles
bajada: El gobierno estadounidense levantó los controles de exportación sobre Claude Fable 5 y Mythos 5, permitiendo a Anthropic restaurar el acceso global. Además, la compañía propone un marco colaborativo con Amazon, Microsoft y Google para evaluar severidad de ataques de jailbreak.
bajada_en: The US government lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, enabling Anthropic to restore global access. Additionally, the company proposes a collaborative framework with Amazon, Microsoft, and Google to assess jailbreak severity scoring.

title: AnnouncementsJun 30, 2026Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now availableClaude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
summary: Announcements Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Jun 30, 2026 Get started with Claude Science AI has the potential to dramatically accelerate the pace of scientific discovery and the development of healthcare interventions. Since launching our efforts in the life sciences last fall, we’ve worked to improve our model capabilities, make connections to the scientific ecosystem via MCPs and skills, and launch partnerships in an effort to realize this potential. Today, we’re introducing our most significant expansion of these efforts: Claude Science , an AI workbench for scientists. Claude Science is an app that integrates the tools and packages that researchers most commonly use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources. Introducing Claude Science Scientific research is often tedious. Researchers must work across dozens of databases, each with their own schema, contend with file formats that require bespoke data pipelines and viewers, and transition between a roster of tools: PubMed, Jupyter, R, a cluster terminal, and more. Claude Science brings these fragmented tools into a single research environment where scientists can conduct all stages of their work. It helps you analyze literature and execute multi-step research, produces detailed artifacts, and lets you iteratively refine figures and manuscripts until they’re ready for publication. Every output carries an auditable history of how it was made, so you can validate and reproduce the results. Like a Jupyter Notebook, you can access Claude Science wherever you already work—locally on macOS or Linux, or on a remote machine over SSH or with an HPC login node. Users interact with a generalist coordinating agent with access to over 60 curated skills and connectors pre-configured for genomics, single-cell, proteomics, structural biology, cheminformatics, and more. These agents can spin up others and engage with specialist agents created by users. And
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude Science, workbench de IA para investigadores
bajada: Claude Science es una aplicación integrada que reúne herramientas científicas fragmentadas en un único entorno de investigación. Permite a investigadores trabajar con bases de datos, código y computación sin cambiar entre múltiples plataformas, acelerando el descubrimiento científico.
bajada_en: Claude Science is an integrated application that brings fragmented scientific tools into a single research environment. It enables researchers to work with databases, code, and computing without switching between multiple platforms, accelerating scientific discovery.

title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
summary: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the Financial Times. CEO Sam Altman argued that giving the public a financial interest in the company would be the best way to share […]
title_es: OpenAI propone dar al gobierno 5% de participación accionaria
bajada: Según reportes, OpenAI ha propuesto transferir el 5% de su participación accionaria al gobierno estadounidense como estrategia para reducir tensiones con la administración Trump. El movimiento busca dar interés financiero público en el éxito de la IA comercial.
bajada_en: According to reports, OpenAI has proposed transferring 5 percent equity stake to the US government as a strategy to reduce tensions with the Trump administration. The move aims to give the public financial interest in commercial AI success.

title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
title_es: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026

title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
title_es: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
bajada: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.

title: Anthropic Added a New Security Measure to Get Back Into the Trump Administration’s Good Graces
summary: The government has removed restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI models—but there were strings attached.
title_es: Anthropic añade medidas de seguridad para restaurar confianza gubernamental
bajada: Anthropic implementó nuevas medidas de seguridad que permitieron al gobierno levantar restricciones sobre sus modelos más avanzados. El acuerdo refleja el rol creciente de consideraciones regulatorias en el despliegue de modelos de IA de frontera.
bajada_en: Anthropic implemented new security measures that enabled the government to lift restrictions on its most advanced models. The agreement reflects the growing role of regulatory considerations in frontier AI model deployment.

title: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
summary: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.
title_es: Claude Opus usado para hackear plataforma de venta de entradas de festivales
bajada: Un investigador demostró que Claude Opus 4.7 puede ser utilizado para identificar vulnerabilidades en Front Gate, la plataforma de ticketing usada por festivales como Lollapalooza y Bonnaroo. El caso subraya la importancia de evaluaciones de seguridad para modelos agenticos.
bajada_en: A researcher demonstrated that Claude Opus 4.7 can identify vulnerabilities in Front Gate, the ticketing platform used by festivals like Lollapalooza and Bonnaroo. The case underscores the importance of security evaluations for agentic models.

title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
summary: Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office and Google Apps with AI.
title_es: Empresario indio invierte $30M en alternativa de IA a Microsoft Office
bajada: Bhavin Turakhia lanza Neo, una plataforma que compite directamente con Microsoft Office y Google Workspace usando IA como característica central. La startup refleja la tendencia de desafiar productos consolidados con enfoques potenciados por IA.
bajada_en: Bhavin Turakhia launches Neo, a platform competing directly with Microsoft Office and Google Workspace using AI as a core feature. The startup reflects the trend of challenging established products with AI-powered approaches.

title: You Can Now Sound the Alarm on AI Behaving Badly
summary: Are you worried your AI chatbot is trying to build a bomb or leak personal information about you? There’s a website for that.
title_es: Nuevo sitio web permite reportar comportamientos peligrosos de IA
bajada: Surge una plataforma dedicada para reportar fallos de seguridad en sistemas de IA, desde intentos de fabricación de explosivos hasta fugas de información personal. La iniciativa democratiza la identificación de vulnerabilidades en modelos disponibles públicamente.
bajada_en: A dedicated platform emerges for reporting AI safety failures, from explosive device instructions to personal information leaks. The initiative democratizes vulnerability identification in publicly available models.

title: Teaching AI to run with the turbines
summary: Artificial intelligence may have captured the public imagination through chatbots and image generators, but some of its most consequential use cases are unfolding far from consumer-facing tools. In industries where physical infrastructure, operational continuity, and safety are paramount, AI is becoming a core operating layer. With its sprawling industrial systems and constant stream of operational…
title_es: IA es aplicada a turbinas eólicas para optimizar operaciones industriales
bajada: Investigadores aplican IA a infraestructura industrial como turbinas eólicas, demostrando casos de uso críticos más allá de chatbots. Esta aplicación en sistemas físicos críticos requiere enfoques diferentes para seguridad y confiabilidad operacional.
bajada_en: Researchers apply AI to industrial infrastructure like wind turbines, demonstrating critical use cases beyond chatbots. This application in safety-critical physical systems requires different approaches for operational reliability.

title: The Download: a startup has a solution for AI’s groupthink problem
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. LLMs are stuck in a groupthink groove. This startup is trying to get them out. Open up your chatbot of choice—Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini—and type “Give me a random number between 1…
title_es: Startup busca resolver el problema de conformismo en modelos de lenguaje
bajada: Una startup identifica y ataca el problema de que los LLMs tienden a producir respuestas similares y conformistas. El enfoque busca mejorar la diversidad y originalidad en las salidas de modelos como Claude, ChatGPT y Gemini.
bajada_en: A startup identifies and addresses the problem of LLMs tending to produce similar, conformist responses. The approach aims to improve diversity and originality in outputs from models like Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini.

title: browser-use /video-use
summary:
video-use Introducing video-use — edit videos with Claude Code. 100% open source. Drop raw footage in a folder, chat with Claude Code, get final.mp4 back. Works for any content — talking heads, montages, tutorials, travel, interviews — without presets or menus. Try video-use in Browser Use Cloud . What it does Cuts out filler words ( umm , uh , false starts) and dead space between takes Auto color grades every segment (warm cinematic, neutral punch, or any custom ffmpeg chain) 30ms audio fades at every cut so you never hear a pop Burns subtitles in your style — 2-word UPPERCASE chunks by default, fully customizable Generates animation overlays via HyperFrames , Remotion , Manim , or PIL — spawned in parallel sub-agents, one per animation Self-evaluates the rendered output at every cut boundary before showing you anything Persists session memory in project.md so next week's session picks up where you left off Setup prompt Paste into Claude Code, Codex, Hermes, Openclaw, or any agent with shell access: Set up https://github.com/browser-use/video-use for me.

Read install.md first to install this repo, wire up ffmpeg, register the skill with whichever agent you're running under, and set up the ElevenLabs API key — ask me to paste it when you need it. Then read SKILL.md for daily usage, and always read helpers/ because that's where the editing scripts live. After install, don't transcribe anything on your own — just tell me it's ready and wait for me to drop footage into a folder. The agent handles the clone, dependencies, skill registration, and prompts you once for your ElevenLabs API key (grab one at elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys ). Then point your agent at a folder of raw takes: cd /path/to/your/videos
claude # or codex, hermes, etc. For always-on editing from your own VPS or Telegram, run the agent through Browser Use Box . Watch the 15-second demo . And in the session: edit these into a launch video It inventories the sources, proposes a strategy, waits for
title_es: Browser-use lanza video-use, herramienta agentica para edición de video
bajada: Video-use es una herramienta open-source que integra Claude Code para edición de video totalmente automatizada. Elimina filler words, gradeación de color automática, subtítulos y animaciones sin necesidad de presets ni menús tradicionales.
bajada_en: video-use is an open-source tool that integrates Claude Code for fully automated video editing. It removes filler words, auto-grades color, adds custom subtitles and animations without presets or traditional menus.
